item.title: America’s Humiliating Defeat
item.description: Iran got the United States to sign a document that even Americans described as degrading, mortifying, a total capitulation.
item.dc:creator: Graeme Wood

item.title: What Did You Expect?
item.description: Perhaps this was always how Trump’s ill-conceived war was destined to end.
item.dc:creator: Daniel B. Shapiro

item.title: All the Sad Hawks
item.description: Neoconservatives are struggling to reconcile their hopes for Trump with the failure of his Iran war.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Chait

item.title: The Apotheosis of Donald Trump
item.description: On the president’s 80th birthday, it became clear that he has entered his decline.
item.dc:creator: Peter Wehner

item.title: An Ascendant Constitutional Theory Is a Threat to American Science
item.description: The idea of a “unitary executive” is now being extended to America’s scientific establishment, with potentially devastating effects.
item.dc:creator: Mark Histed

item.title: Why July 4 Turned Into a Trump Rally
item.description: The president has never accepted that the head of state and the leader of the Republican Party are separate roles.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Chait

item.title: The Cult of Delayed Gratification Is a Lie
item.description: The sensory enchantment of everyday life can upend the bland monotony of our overly optimized, anodyne world.
item.dc:creator: Ian Bogost

item.title: The Unpopular Truth About World Cup Ticket Prices
item.description: When seats cost too little, ticket speculators reap the benefits.
item.dc:creator: Judd Kessler

item.title: Why AI Is Incorrigibly Didactic
item.description: The rise of machine writing is a great opportunity for literature.
item.dc:creator: Adam Kirsch

item.title: My Descent Into Mah-Jongg
item.description: The game seems to be everywhere, all at once.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Parker
